meta.title: Triko — Everyday Comfort, Made for You
meta.description: Discover Triko's collection of comfortable pants, pajamas, and loungewear designed for everyday wear. Shop now for soft fabrics and thoughtful fits.

Hero.h1: Soft by design, Made for everyday comfort
Hero.sub: Kimono, pajamas, and loungewear — comfort and simplicity for every day.
Hero.imgAlt: Triko loungewear on a model in a soft-lit studio

Story.title: Designed in Georgia. Made for slow mornings.
Story.sub: Thoughtful fits, breathable fabrics, and details that matter.
Story.imgAlt: Lifestyle photo showing Triko products in a cozy home

meta.title: Sign in — Triko
meta.description: Sign in to your Triko account to track orders, manage your profile, and save favorites. Secure login with email or Google.

meta.title: Forgot password — Reset your Triko account
meta.description: Enter your email to get a secure password reset link from Triko. Recover access to your account, orders, favorites, and profile in minutes.

meta.title: Set new password — Secure your Triko account
meta.description: Create a strong new password to finish your Triko password reset. Then sign in to manage orders, favorites, and your profile securely.

meta.title: Sign up — Triko
meta.description: Create a Triko account to track orders, manage your profile, and save favorites. Fast, secure sign up with email or Google.

meta.title: Contact — Triko
meta.description: Get in touch with Triko. Find our store locations in Tbilisi and Kutaisi, or reach us online for support and inquiries.

meta.title: About — Triko
meta.description: Discover Triko: our story, mission, values, and store locations.

hero.title: Comfort-first essentials designed in Tbilisi
hero.subtitle: Triko blends cozy materials, thoughtful fits, and clean lines to create everyday pieces you’ll reach for again and again.

story.title: Where we began
story.paragraph1: Founded in Tbilisi, Triko started with a simple goal: make comfortable, durable, and beautifully minimal pieces that feel great from morning to night.
story.paragraph2: Today, we keep production nimble, materials carefully sourced, and designs focused on what matters: fit, comfort, and longevity.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.desc: Build a reliable wardrobe of everyday basics—crafted with care, priced fairly, and made to last. We design for movement, softness, and simplicity.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We source comfortable fabrics and use careful stitching for durability.

comfort.title: Comfort
comfort.desc: Every pattern is tested to move with you throughout the day.

design.title: Timeless Design
design.desc: Clean silhouettes, neutral palettes, and subtle details.

service.title: Service
service.desc: Fast responses and friendly support across channels.

locations.title: Our stores
locations.subtitle: Visit us in person—try on styles, feel fabrics, and get fit advice.

store4.title: Kutaisi
store4.address: 14 Tamar Mepe St (Cinema Georgia building, 2nd floor)

cta.title: Ready to feel the difference?
cta.subtitle: Explore our latest drops and everyday staples.
